title: SEO Engine Effectiveness Audit — Phase 21
summary: In 7 days, the autonomous SEO engine executed 3 deployments with measurable changes (CTR fixes, internal links, template changes). However, 0 clicks resulted, impressions declined from peak, and the single 28-day click was a branded homepage search. The engine was active but its actions did not yet produce measurable ranking/click improvements.

kpi_at_end_of_period.impressions_trend: +32.1% WoW (but still down from 499 peak Jun 2-8 window)

actions_audited.expected_kpi: Improved CTR → clicks on near-winner pages
actions_audited.actual_change: No clicks yet. Both pages still ranking (pos 8.8, 11.9) but 0 clicks.
actions_audited.good_neutral_bad: NEUTRAL — Titles improved but no click-through yet. Cooldown expiring.
actions_audited.continue_stop_change: CONTINUE — Add internal links and FAQ to these pages.

actions_audited.action_type: Tool variant title improvements + 1 real CTR fix
urls_changed: Mortgage, compound, investment thin tool variant templates (~150 URLs)
actions_audited.actual_change: No clicks. Thin variant improvements WERE WRONG — they strengthen cannibalization against parent calculators.
actions_audited.good_neutral_bad: BAD — Optimizing thin variants as independent ranking targets is counterproductive.
actions_audited.continue_stop_change: STOP — Thin variant optimization frozen in Phase 20.7. Rollback applied.

urls_changed: Loan, mortgage, investment, compound thin variant templates (~150 URLs)
actions_audited.expected_kpi: Better internal authority flow to parent calculators
actions_audited.expected_delay: 2-4 weeks for internal link authority transfer
actions_audited.actual_change: Too early to measure. Internal links are a long-term play.
actions_audited.good_neutral_bad: NEUTRAL — Internal links are good but thin template CTR fixes were bad. Rollback applied.
actions_audited.continue_stop_change: CONTINUE internal links. STOP thin variant SEO.

urls_changed: seo-utils.ts: 10 template changes (reverting click-bait to descriptive)
actions_audited.expected_kpi: Reduce cannibalization. Parent calculators should strengthen.
actions_audited.expected_delay: 3-7 days for recrawl of changed pages
actions_audited.actual_change: Just deployed. Too early to measure.
actions_audited.continue_stop_change: CONTINUE — This is the right direction.

actions_audited.good_neutral_bad: BAD — Zero response rate after 20 emails.
actions_audited.continue_stop_change: CHANGE — Jun 13 follow-up with shorter value-first pitch. If still 0 replies, pause outreach entirely.

engine_scorecard.overall_grade: D — Active but not yet effective. Requires correction before resuming normal execution.
